description: Create the base station tileset for floors, walls, doors, and structural elements across the 3 MVP sector themes (Docking Ring, Habitation Deck, Engineering). Use the restricted color palette from the spec.
acceptance_criteria: A 32x32 pixel tileset image contains all base tiles organized in a grid spritesheet.
Floor tile variants exist for each sector: metal grating (Docking), carpet/linoleum (Habitation), heavy plating (Engineering).
Wall tiles include: solid hull wall, windowed wall, damaged/cracked wall, and doorframe.
Door tiles exist for each state: open, closed, locked (red indicator light), and destroyed.
Interactive object tiles exist: terminal (on/off states), power junction, crate, locker, chair, table.
All tiles use the color palette from spec A.2.2: dark grays/blues for hull, warm amber for powered elements, red for emergency.
The tileset loads as a single spritesheet image with a companion JSON mapping tile IDs to spritesheet coordinates.
spec_section: 8.1 Visual Direction, A.2.2 Color Palette Strategy, 11.1 MVP Scope (Art)
notes: Spec: 'Retro-future industrial — think Alien (1979) control rooms. CRT monitors with green phosphor text. Chunky mechanical switches.' Placeholder colored rectangles work until this story is complete.
